# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservices-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservices
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservices
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservices-container
        image: your-microservices-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1000
          runAsGroup: 3000
          fsGroup: 27
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservices-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: microservices
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: microservices-ingress
spec:
  rules:
  - host: microservices-demo.example.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        pathType: Prefix
        backend:
          service:
            name: microservices-service
            port:
              number: 80
